name: Zucchini Ankara
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and garlic, sauté until onions are translucent.
3. Add zucchini and marjoram; cook on medium heat until zucchini is just tender.
4. Stir in garbanzos, black olives, cumin (or 2 teaspoons mint if desired), lemon juice, and seasonings.
5. Cook until everything is heated through.
6. Serve over cooked rice or couscous.
7. Top with feta cheese.
Source: New Recipes from Moosewood Restaurant
